_comment: Pension plan stacking patterns for Virginia. Links VRS primary plans with ERFC supplemental plans. Used by consumer applications to resolve which plans apply based on hire date and employment.

planCombinations._description: Common pension stacking patterns. ERFC is supplemental to a VRS primary plan. Both must be resolved independently.

vrs_hybrid_erfc_tier2.label: VRS Hybrid + ERFC 2001 Tier 2
vrs_hybrid_erfc_tier2.note: VRS Hybrid DB pension + ERFC supplemental pension + Social Security. VRS Hybrid DC accounts (401a, 457b) tracked separately as investment accounts.

vrs_hybrid_erfc_tier1.label: VRS Hybrid + ERFC 2001 Tier 1
vrs_hybrid_erfc_tier1.note: VRS Hybrid DB + ERFC Tier 1 supplemental + SS

vrs_plan2_erfc_tier1.label: VRS Plan 2 + ERFC 2001 Tier 1
vrs_plan2_erfc_tier1.note: VRS Plan 2 DB + ERFC Tier 1 supplemental + SS

vrs_plan1_erfc_legacy.label: VRS Plan 1 + ERFC Legacy
vrs_plan1_erfc_legacy.note: VRS Plan 1 DB + ERFC Legacy supplemental + SS
